title: Bug With GEO query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE geo_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, longitude DECIMAL(10, 8), latitude DECIMAL(10, 8), geo_point POINT);
INSERT INTO geo_data (id, longitude, latitude) VALUES (1, 12.345678, 34.567890);
INSERT INTO geo_data (id, longitude, latitude) VALUES (2, NULL, 45.678901);
SELECT id, ST_Distance(ST_Point(longitude, latitude), ST_Point(12.345678, 34.567890)) AS distance FROM geo_data HAVING distance <= 0.5;
SELECT id FROM geo_data WHERE longitude IS NULL OR latitude IS NULL;
key_bug_features: FILTER with st_distance function causes DB_NULL error
